# catalystcenter_external_authentication (Resource)

Enable or disable external authentication for Catalyst Center user login. AAA or ISE servers must be configured before external authentication can be enabled.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "catalystcenter_external_authentication" "example" {
  name    = "external_authentication"
  enabled = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `enabled` (Boolean) Enable or disable external authentication for Catalyst Center users.
- `name` (String) Fixed resource identifier.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The id of the object

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import catalystcenter_external_authentication.example "<name>"
```
